titleStmt.title: SII 15.61: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 61. (B.K. No. 51 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into a platform of Kāśi Viśvanātha temple.

This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, Pushya śu. 5, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. In the said cyclic year the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti occurred on Pushya ba. 5 and not śu. 5. Assuming śu. 5 to be a mistake for ba. 5, the date may be equated with 1184 A.D., December 24, Monday °04.

It records a gift of money out of the income from minting transactions made by Āchiseṭṭi in the presence of the One Thousand for worship and offerings to the god Mallikārjuna, located in the temple of Madhusūdana. Āṇikāra Mahadēvaseṭṭi also made a similar gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmacāḷukyacakrava¨rtti vīrasōmē
śvaradēvava¨rṣada 3 neya krōdhi saṁva
tsarada puṣya suddha 5 sōmavāradaṁdinutta
rāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu śrī
sāsi¨rvvara sannidhānadalu śrī vinayasaṁpanna
Āciseṭṭiyaru śrī madhusūdanadēvaroḷagaṇa
mallikā¨rjunadēvara dānamaccina kēṇiyalu pa
trahastarādalli naivēdyakke biṭṭa ga 1 saṁkrāṁ
tiyalu Aṁgabhōgakke biṭṭa ga 1 Antu ga 2
Āṇikāra mahadēvaseṭṭi ha 2 Āvanā
giyuṁ hiri kamma da ṇiyaṁ kā
dalu taṁtamma dha¨rmmavāgi pratipāḷisuvaru
Adanaḷidava¨rgge sahasrabrāhmaṇara hiṁ
sa māḍida dōṣamakku .
Digital edition of SII 15.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
